title: Nominal cooling capacity range
summary: LSBLX series centrifugal chillers nominal cooling capacities: 2000, 2400, 2800, 3200, 3600, 4000 kW
evidence_quote:
型号 LSBLX2000 LSBLX2400 LSBLX2800
制冷量kW 2000 2400 2800
型号 LSBLX3200 LSBLX3600 LSBLX4000
制冷量kW 3200 3600 4000

title: Capacity adjustment range
summary: Capacity adjustment range is 10% to 100% for all models

title: Refrigerant type and charge
summary: Refrigerant R134a, charge varies by model: 750 kg (2000), 800 kg (2400), 850 kg (2800), 950 kg (3200), 1000 kg (3600), 1050 kg (4000)

title: Lubricant type and charge
summary: Lubricant: 68 synthetic ester oil, charge: 80 L (2000-2800), 100 L (3200-3600), 125 L (4000)
evidence_quote: 种类  68 号合成脂类润滑油 冷冻油 灌注量 L 80 80 80 100 100 125

title: Evaporator water flow rate
summary: Evaporator water flow rates: 345, 414, 485, 550, 620, 688 m³/h for models 2000-4000

title: Condenser water flow rate
summary: Condenser water flow rates: 420, 505, 590, 670, 760, 826 m³/h for models 2000-4000

title: Evaporator water pressure drop
summary: Evaporator water pressure drop: 90 kPa (2000-2800), 115 kPa (3200-4000)

title: Condenser water pressure drop
summary: Condenser water pressure drop: 85 kPa (2000-2800), 115 kPa (3200-4000)

title: Chilled water outlet temperature setpoint
summary: Chilled water outlet temperature is controlled at 7±0.3°C
evidence_quote: 使冷冻水出温恒定在7±0.3℃

title: Oil heater temperature control range
summary: Oil heater maintains oil tank temperature between 48°C and 52°C when compressor is off
evidence_quote: 保证压缩机停机后，油箱温度保持在48～52℃之间

title: Oil supply temperature range
summary: Oil supply temperature should be maintained between 35°C and 50°C during operation
evidence_quote: 制冷机运行中用油温调节阀将供油温度调节在35℃～50℃范围内

title: Oil pressure differential normal range
summary: Normal oil pressure differential (supply minus tank) is 150-250 kPa during operation
evidence_quote: 供油压力比油箱压力高 150～250kPa范围内

title: Minimum oil pressure differential for startup
summary: Oil pressure differential must be at least 250 kPa to allow compressor start
evidence_quote: 供油压差(供油压力与油箱内压力之差)不足250kPa

title: Minimum condenser-evaporator pressure difference
summary: Condenser pressure minus evaporator pressure must be at least 200 kPa to ensure motor and oil cooling
evidence_quote: 使冷凝压力与蒸发压力之差不低于 200kPa

title: Minimum compressor restart interval
summary: Compressor must wait at least 20 minutes after shutdown before restarting
evidence_quote: 压缩机停机后，停机时间至少需要20分钟才能重新开机

title: Chilled water pump lead/lag times
summary: Chilled water pump starts 5 minutes before oil pump, stops 5 minutes after main motor shutdown
evidence_quote: 冷冻水泵相对于油泵提前5分钟启动...冷冻水泵相对于主电机延时 5分钟关闭

title: Condenser water pump timing
summary: Condenser water pump starts 30 seconds after chilled water pump, stops 5 minutes after main motor
evidence_quote: 冷却水泵延时冷冻水泵30秒启动...冷却水泵相对于主电机延时5分钟关闭

title: Guide vane minimum opening
summary: Guide vane opening must not be less than 5% in automatic operation
evidence_quote: 导叶进入自动运行后，在5％～100％间运行。导叶开度不得小于 5％

title: Oil pump post-lubrication time
summary: Oil pump continues to run for 3 minutes after compressor shutdown
evidence_quote: 关主电机，关导叶至零，延时3分钟关油泵

title: Maximum mechanical run time without refrigerant
summary: Mechanical run without refrigerant must not exceed 5 minutes to prevent overheating
evidence_quote: 机械运转不得超过 5分钟

title: Leak test pressure and criteria
summary: Leak test: pressurize to 1150±50 kPa, pressure drop must not exceed 11.5 kPa in 24 hours
evidence_quote: 向机内充入1150±50kPa(表压) 左右的氮气...24h后压力降不超过11.5kPa为合格

title: Vacuum test criteria
summary: Vacuum test: evacuate to below 1 kPa absolute, pressure rise must not exceed 0.4 kPa in 24 hours
evidence_quote: 将机内抽至绝对压力为 1kPa（7.5mmHg）以下的真空...若机内压力的回升超过 0.4 kPa (3mmHg),则应重新进行气密试验

title: Chilled water outlet temperature operating range
summary: Chilled water outlet temperature range: 5 to 15°C

title: Cooling water outlet temperature operating range
summary: Cooling water outlet temperature range: 22 to 37°C

title: Chilled water temperature difference range
summary: Chilled water entering-leaving temperature difference range: 2.5 to 8°C

title: Cooling water temperature difference range
summary: Cooling water entering-leaving temperature difference range: 3.5 to 8°C

title: Nominal rating conditions
summary: Nominal conditions: chilled water 12/7°C, cooling water 30/35°C
evidence_quote:
冷冻水 冷却水
进水温度(℃ ) 出水温度(℃ ) 进水温度(℃ ) 出水温度(℃ )
12 7 30 35

油压差报
警/保护 压缩机油
压差报警/
保护 供油压力
油箱压力

报警/保

保护 油泵热继电器

title: Phase loss/reversal protection
summary: Fault: 缺逆相保护. Triggered by phase loss or reversal signal from starter cabinet.
evidence_quote:
缺逆相保
护 缺逆相保
护 启动柜

title: Sensor fault protection
summary: Fault: 传感器故障. Triggered by sensor failure; response varies by sensor type.
evidence_quote:
传感器故
障 传感器故
障保护 各传感器

title: Surge protection
summary: Fault: 喘振保护. Triggered by periodic current fluctuations indicating surge.
evidence_quote: 喘振保护  喘振保护 主机电流

title: Frequent start/stop protection
summary: Fault: 频繁启停禁止开机. Triggered if more than 8 starts in 12 hours; alarm cannot be cleared until next 12-hour period.
evidence_quote:
频繁启停
禁止开机  频繁启停
保护 启停次数和时
间记录 机组在12小时内开机次数超过 8次时，报警，禁止启动
